scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently "npm run watch" "electron ."
scripts.watch: concurrently "esbuild electron/main/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --outfile=dist/main.js --format=cjs --watch" "esbuild electron/main/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --outfile=dist/preload.js --format=cjs --watch" "esbuild electron/renderer/renderer.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer.js --watch --loader:.js=jsx --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='\"development\"'" "tailwindcss -i electron/renderer/styles.css -o dist/tailwind.css --watch"
scripts.build: esbuild electron/main/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --outfile=dist/main.js --format=cjs && esbuild electron/main/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --external:electron --outfile=dist/preload.js --format=cjs && esbuild electron/renderer/renderer.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer.js --loader:.js=jsx --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"development"' && tailwindcss -i electron/renderer/styles.css -o dist/tailwind.css
